tool_args.label: Rockaway Line Resiliency and Viaduct Rehabilitation

payload.project_name: Rockaway Line Resiliency and Viaduct Rehabilitation
payload.description: Long-term flood mitigations along the Rockaway Line carrying the A train through Jamaica Bay estuary and to the Rockaway Peninsula, bundled with viaduct rehabilitation and upgrades to the South Channel Bridge.

New LEED-certified bus depot replacing the 85-year-old structure, including 135,000 sq ft bus facility, 34,000 sq ft administrative building, capacity for 272 buses, 15 maintenance bays, 3 drive-through washers, 3 fueling stations, and 60 BEB charging ports.

tool_args.label: Structure Repair and Overcoating - Jamaica Line

payload.project_name: Structure Repair and Overcoating – Jamaica Line
payload.project_type: elevated structure steel repairs and painting
payload.description: Elevated line structural steel repairs, abatement, and painting for approximately 4 miles of elevated structures along the Jamaica Avenue Line (B Division – BMT) in Brooklyn, including the East New York Leads and Loops (includes the Canarsie line), from approximately Marcy Avenue station to the Broadway Junction complex.

tool_args.label: Line Structure Component Repairs on Broadway 7th Avenue Line and 8th Avenue Line

payload.project_name: Line Structure Component Repairs on Broadway 7th Avenue Line (IRT) and 8th Avenue Line (IND)
payload.description: Contract C-48726 Design-Bid-Build project for structural repairs on deteriorated structures along Broadway 7th Avenue Line (IRT) and 8th Avenue Line (IND) in Manhattan, including repair of track columns, roof beams, parapet walls, bridge bearings, leak mitigation, demolition of abandoned circuit breaker house, and new pumps.

payload.scope: Rockaway Line Resiliency and Viaduct Rehabilitation
